data.title: Bitcoin's rebound uncertain as Iran war repercussions to 'dominate' markets in 2026, delaying rate cuts until at least Q3: Analyst Nic Puckrin.
data.description: The aftermath of the conflict in Iran is anticipated to have a significant impact on markets throughout 2026, leading to the postponement of any potential rate cuts until at least the third quarter, according to Nic Puckrin from the Coin Bureau.

data.title: Christine Fréchette selected to lead Coalition Avenir Québec, as party faces challenges in upcoming vote with a large gap in polls.
data.description: Trailing in the polls, Quebec's ruling party appointed Christine Fréchette as the successor to François Legault to lead them in the upcoming election this fall.

data.title: Kornit Digital Acquires PrintFactory to Accelerate the Industry’s Transition to Digital, On-Demand Production
data.description: The recent acquisition by Kornit enhances its platform strategy by extending digital access to the worldwide screen-printing market. This move also propels the advancement of a connected infrastructure that bridges the gap between demand, production, and fulfillment. This acquisition marks a significant step in solidifying Kornit's position in the market and opening up new opportunities for growth and expansion.

data.title: Kornit Digital Brings Global Apparel Leaders Together to Accelerate the Move Towards On-Demand Production
data.description: Enhancing digital infrastructure to link demand generation, production, and fulfillment on a global level. This initiative involves significant investment, with funds exceeding $1 billion. The aim is to bolster the digital framework, ensuring seamless connectivity across various stages of the supply chain worldwide. This expansion will facilitate smoother operations, optimize efficiency, and support scalability to meet growing demand in the market.

data.title: Kornit Digital Redefines Apparel Production for the On-Demand Era Unveiling Atlas MATRIX at Konnections 2026
data.description: Manufacturers are now able to operate across cotton, polyester, and blended fabrics with unprecedented flexibility. This allows them to print the necessary fabrics at the highest retail quality, marking a significant advancement in the industry. This development provides producers with the ability to cater to diverse fabric needs efficiently and effectively.
